title: leptonychia pallidiflora
intro: Leptonychia pallidiflora, also known as the 'pale-flowered Leptonychia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Leptonychia pallidiflora include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments.
